exercises.name: Walk out to Push Up
exercises.description: From a standing position, walk your hands forward into a plank, perform a push-up, then walk your hands back toward your feet and return to standing.

exercises.name: Walking lunge with knee drive
exercises.description: From a standing position, step forward into a lunge, then drive the back leg forward into a front kick, using it as the new front leg to continue walking forward with each repetition.

exercises.name: Walking Lunges with Rotation
exercises.description:
Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart and your hands clasped in front of your chest. Step forward into a lunge, lowering both knees to about 90 degrees. 

Once stable, rotate your torso toward the side of your front leg while keeping your chest lifted and core engaged. 

Return your torso to the center, push through your front heel to stand, and step forward into the next lunge, rotating to the opposite side. Continue alternating as you move forward.

exercises.name: Walkout to Shoulder Tap
exercises.description:
Start standing tall with your feet hip-width apart. Hinge at the hips and walk your hands forward on the floor until you reach a high plank position, keeping your body in a straight line from head to heels. 

Once in plank, lift one hand to tap the opposite shoulder, then return it to the floor and repeat on the other side. 

After completing the shoulder taps, walk your hands back toward your feet to return to standing.

exercises.name: Walkout to Shoulder Taps
exercises.description: Start in a standing position, then bend forward and walk your hands out on the floor until you’re in a plank. From the plank, lift one hand and tap the opposite shoulder, then switch hands. Walk your hands back to standing and repeat.

exercises.name: Walkouts
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing with feet shoulder-width apart. 

2. Reach your hands down towards the mat, and slowly walk your hands all the way out to a plank position.

3. While keeping your hips in line, and abdomen tight, walk your hands all the way back up to the standing position.

exercises.name: Wall Sit
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, ensure your knees don’t move forward past your toes. 

2) Try to keep your knees at 90 degrees and hold.

exercises.name: Wall tricep ext with band abd hold
Warrior 2 Pull to Press
exercises.description: Hold weights in Warrior 2 pose. Pull weights to your shoulders, then press overhead while maintaining balance.

exercises.name: Warrior Pose Flow 1, 2, 3
exercises.description: Flow through a series of yoga warrior poses: Warrior 1, Warrior 2, and Warrior 3, focusing on balance, strength, and flexibility.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Butterfly Pull Up
exercises.description:
1. Wearing a weighted vest, start by gripping a pull-up bar with a grip slightly wider than shoulder-width. 

2. Initiate the movement with the shoulders, pushing your body into an arched back position. 

3. From the arched position, lift your hips and legs straight up towards the bar, pulling yourself upwards at the same time. 

4. Pull yourself up until your chin is above the bar. Maintain the arched position with your torso, allowing the body to travel forwards before kipping for the next rep.

exercises.name: Weight Vest Pull Up
exercises.description:
1. Start by wearing a weighted vest and gripping a pull up bar at shoulder-width.

2. Pull yourself up towards the bar until your chin is above the bar height. 

3. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.

exercises.name: Weighted Chin Up
exercises.description:
1.Wearing a weight belt, grab a pull up bar, palms facing you. Arms and legs straightened making your body hang.

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Weighted Feet Up Crunch
exercises.description:
1.Lie on your back with your knees bent and feet raised, holding a dumbbell up over your chest with your arms straight.

2.Lift your head and shoulders off the floor, keeping your feet raised and arms straight.

3.Lower your head and shoulders returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Weighted Full Sit Up
exercises.description:
1) Perform a normal sit-up exercise. 

2) Hug a weighted plate across your chest to add resistance.

exercises.name: Weighted Parallel Grip Pull Up
exercises.description:
1.Wearing a weight belt, grab a pull up bar in an upward fist position. Arms and legs straightened making your body hang.

2.Pull your body upwards until your chin is just over the bar.

3.Lower your body returning to starting position.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Weighted Wall Sit
exercises.description: Hold a weight with both hands and stand two feet in front of a wall and lean against it. Slide down until your knees are at a 90 degree angle. Hold this position for as many seconds as you comfortably can. Slowly raise back to start. Repeat.
